footer.text: You have received this email because a password reset was requested for your Moedzee account.
sign-up.subject: Account Setup - Welcome to Moedzee
password-reset.subject: Reset your password
password-reset.body: We received a request to reset your password. Click the button below to create a new password.
password-reset.recovery-phrase-required: You will need your recovery phrase to complete recovery.
password-reset.link-expiry: If you didn't request this password reset, please ignore this email. This link will expire in 15 minutes.
magic-link.subject: Your sign-in link
magic-link.body: We received a request to sign in to your account. Click the button below to complete your sign-in. This link can only be used once.
magic-link.for-reference: For your reference, your login is
